security_architecture.tls_boundary: HTTPS terminated at Application Load Balancer with TLS 1.3 only
security_architecture.auth_gateway: Reverse proxy routing through OIDC/OAuth2 authentication proxy before reaching control API
security_architecture.role_model: RBAC mapping token scopes directly to FastAPI backend route dependencies

runtime_architecture.read_write_separation: Read-only GET endpoints isolated from POST/PUT/DELETE transaction endpoints
runtime_architecture.mutation_gate: Transactional DB operations routed to temporary lock tables requiring review
runtime_architecture.approval_gate: FastAPI authorization dependency requiring dual signatures for any run-level prompt activation

audit_architecture.ledger: Append-only ledger using schema-enforced DB restrictions preventing modifications
audit_architecture.event_ids: Unique UUID injected at HTTP middleware level and propagated to all sub-requests
audit_architecture.accountability: Operator identity bound to every ledger record with cryptographically signed logs

supply_chain.process: Automated pipeline compiling SPDX SBOM, in-toto provenance, and signing artifacts via cosign key pair

deployment_topology.environments: Isolated development, staging, and production environments with zero cross-network traffic allowed

observability.logs: CloudWatch/GCP Cloud Logging JSON format with structured trace parent attributes
observability.metrics: Prometheus metrics endpoint capturing runtime latency, error rates, and operator session lengths
observability.health_checks: Probes checking DB connection pool status, system CPU, and API readiness
observability.alerting: PagerDuty hooks triggered on P99 response time anomalies or unauthorized mutation attempts

recovery.backup: Encrypted daily block-level backups stored in multi-region GCS/S3 buckets
recovery.restore: Weekly automated sandbox restore sequence verifying schema integrity
recovery.rollback: GitOps-based automatic container image rollback on deployment health check failure

compliance.evidence_model: Evidence mapping table matching each control to NIST SP 800-53 / SLSA frameworks, outputting JSON bundles
